list.definition: SELECT id as __value, CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text FROM cars ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;
list.label: 车辆
list.name: car_id
list.query: SELECT id as __value, CASE WHEN COUNT(id) OVER (PARTITION BY name) > 1 AND name IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT(name, ' - ', RIGHT(vin, 6)) ELSE COALESCE(name, CONCAT('VIN ', vin)) end as __text FROM cars ORDER BY display_priority ASC, name ASC, vin ASC;

list.description: 🌏 地图源切换 — 6 种瓦片一键切换。中国大陆推荐：高德地图。
list.label: 地图源
list.name: map_url
list.query: OpenStreetMap : https://tile.openstreetmap.org/{z}/{x}/{y}.png,高德地图 : https://wprd01.is.autonavi.com/appmaptile?lang=zh_cn&size=1&scale=1&style=7&x={x}&y={y}&z={z},高德卫星 : https://webst01.is.autonavi.com/appmaptile?style=6&x={x}&y={y}&z={z},谷歌地图 : https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=m&x={x}&y={y}&z={z},谷歌卫星 : https://mt1.google.com/vt/lyrs=s&x={x}&y={y}&z={z},Carto 浅色 : https://cartodb-basemaps-c.global.ssl.fastly.net/light_all/{z}/{x}/{y}.png

options.content:
# 🏆 充电桩性价比榜

按 **¥/度（实际单价）** 排序所有充电点。家充自动按你配的分时电价计算（配了用分时，没开用原价）。

**怎么看：**
- **绿色 = 便宜（< ¥0.6/度，多半是家充谷段）**
- 黄色 = 中等（0.6-1.0）
- 橙色/红色 = 贵（超充和高峰电）
- 圆点大小 = 充电次数（越大去得越多）

targets.rawSql:
WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)
 SELECT COUNT(*) AS "次" FROM stations

WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)
 SELECT ROUND(SUM(cost)::numeric, 2) AS "¥" FROM stations

WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)

SELECT
  station AS "充电点",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/SUM(charge_energy_added))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度 (分时)"
FROM stations GROUP BY station
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND SUM(charge_energy_added) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(cost)/SUM(charge_energy_added) ASC LIMIT 3

WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)

SELECT
  station AS "充电点",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/SUM(charge_energy_added))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度 (分时)"
FROM stations GROUP BY station
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND SUM(charge_energy_added) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(cost)/SUM(charge_energy_added) DESC LIMIT 3

panels.title: 🏆 充电桩排行榜（按 ¥/度 升序，分时 = 按你配的峰平谷算的真实价；原价 = TeslaMate 简单平均）

targets.rawSql:
WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)

SELECT
  ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0) ASC) AS "排名",
  station AS "充电点",
  COUNT(*) AS "次数",
  ROUND(SUM(cost)::numeric, 2) AS "累计费用 ¥",
  ROUND(SUM(charge_energy_added)::numeric, 1) AS "累计电量 kWh",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度 (分时)",
  ROUND((SUM(cost_orig)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度 (原价)",
  ROUND(AVG(duration_min)::numeric, 0) AS "平均时长 (分)",
  ROUND((AVG(charge_energy_added * 60.0 / NULLIF(duration_min, 0)))::numeric, 1) AS "平均功率 kW",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/NULLIF(COUNT(*),0))::numeric, 2) AS "次均费用 ¥",
  TO_CHAR(MAX(start_date) AT TIME ZONE 'UTC' AT TIME ZONE '$__timezone', 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS "最近一次"
FROM stations
GROUP BY station
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
ORDER BY SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0) ASC

WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)

SELECT
  station AS "充电点",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度"
FROM stations
GROUP BY station
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 AND SUM(charge_energy_added) > 0
ORDER BY SUM(cost)/SUM(charge_energy_added) ASC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: 📈 最近 30 天 vs 之前的桩单价对比（红 = 涨价，绿 = 降价）

targets.rawSql:
WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)
,
recent AS (
  SELECT station,
    SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0) AS rate_recent,
    COUNT(*) AS n_recent
  FROM stations
  WHERE start_date > NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY station
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
),
older AS (
  SELECT station,
    SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0) AS rate_old,
    COUNT(*) AS n_old
  FROM stations
  WHERE start_date <= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'
  GROUP BY station
  HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
)
SELECT
  COALESCE(r.station, o.station) AS "充电点",
  ROUND(o.rate_old::numeric, 3) AS "之前 ¥/度",
  ROUND(r.rate_recent::numeric, 3) AS "近 30 天 ¥/度",
  ROUND(((r.rate_recent - o.rate_old) / NULLIF(o.rate_old, 0) * 100)::numeric, 1) AS "变化 %",
  o.n_old AS "之前次数",
  r.n_recent AS "近 30 天次数"
FROM recent r FULL OUTER JOIN older o USING (station)
WHERE r.station IS NOT NULL AND o.station IS NOT NULL
  AND ABS(r.rate_recent - o.rate_old) / NULLIF(o.rate_old, 0) > 0.05
ORDER BY ((r.rate_recent - o.rate_old) / NULLIF(o.rate_old, 0)) DESC

panels.title: 🗺️ 充电桩地图（颜色=¥/度，大小=去过的次数）

targets.rawSql:
WITH stations AS (
  SELECT
    cp.id,
    COALESCE(g.name, a.display_name, '未知地点') AS station,
    cp.geofence_id,
    cp.address_id,
    p.latitude AS lat_raw,
    p.longitude AS lng_raw,
    cp.charge_energy_added,
    effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) AS cost,
    cp.cost AS cost_orig,
    cp.duration_min,
    cp.start_date,
    cp.end_date
  FROM charging_processes cp
  LEFT JOIN positions p ON p.id = cp.position_id
  LEFT JOIN geofences g ON g.id = cp.geofence_id
  LEFT JOIN addresses a ON a.id = cp.address_id
  WHERE cp.car_id = $car_id
    AND cp.charge_energy_added > 1
    AND effective_cost(cp.id, cp.cost) IS NOT NULL
    AND cp.duration_min >= 3
    AND $__timeFilter(cp.start_date)
)

SELECT
  station AS "充电点",
  AVG(lat_for_map('${map_url}', lat_raw, lng_raw)) AS "latitude",
  AVG(lng_for_map('${map_url}', lat_raw, lng_raw)) AS "longitude",
  ROUND((SUM(cost)/NULLIF(SUM(charge_energy_added),0))::numeric, 3) AS "¥/度",
  COUNT(*) AS "充电次数",
  ROUND(SUM(cost)::numeric, 2) AS "累计费用"
FROM stations
WHERE lat_raw IS NOT NULL AND lng_raw IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY station
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 1
